title: 100x M2 medium
author: Sarah Seyffert

steps_raw.instruction: Add CaCl 2 2H 2 O (3.6 g · L -1 ) If you do not have hydrated CaCl 2, use 2.718 g CaCl 2 (powder) for 1L of the stock. 0.25 M Na 2 -EDTA stock: Dissolve 2.32 g Na 2 -EDTA (powder) and fill the bottle up with MilliQ (nuclease-free) water up to 25 mL. Afterwards, the pH was adjusted with diluted NaOH to pH = 8.0. K2HPO4 (82,3g·L -1 )
Add MgSO4 · 7 H2O (7.49 g · L-1) If you do not have hydrated MgSO4, use 3.659 g MgSO4 (powder) for 1L of the stock.
Fill up with MiliQ water to one liter
Mix the solution with a stir bar
